title: Bindings, Scope, Closures, and Lifetime · Semantics Case: Closure State
summary: Build configurable counters and validators without leaking mutable state across community-service widgets. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js closure state increment in a closure-backed state and validation library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use closures to retain purposeful private state while recognizing capture and lifetime costs.
Predict declaration instantiation, function hoisting, and temporal dead-zone failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
